sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69170" key="munna/kia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μυννάκ-ια</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τά</orth>, a sort of <sense id="n69170.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shoe</tr_>, from <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Μύννακος</foreign> their maker, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:89" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.89</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
